toggles.description: Blocks Write/Edit/MultiEdit containing detectable secrets. Disable for fixtures that must contain secret-shaped values (rare).
Section-hash stamper for .claude/.orchestra/ artifacts. Disabling breaks drift detection.
Surfaces source-modifying Bash commands (npm install, sed -i, etc.) to stderr. Observer; never blocks.
Injects calibration anchor into @evaluator Task prompts. No-op until evaluator-tuning skill ships in PR #5.
Local-only JSONL telemetry to <project>/.claude/.orchestra/metrics/events.jsonl. Disable for fully air-gapped runs.
Filesystem MCP exposing the `tree` tool. Disable in air-gapped or filesystem-restricted environments.
Runtime probes MCP (http_probe + db_state). Disable when network/database access is undesirable.
Decomposition + SP estimation for @lead's task graph generation.
Test plan + coverage + adversarial fuzz inputs consumed by @test.
Conventional Commits formatter for /orchestra commit and @ship.
CONTRACT schema + Probe DSL authoring guide consumed by @lead.
Calibration examples for @evaluator (consumed by val-calibration hook).
Java ripgrep + impact patterns consumed by @backend on Java/Spring projects.
